[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011011 5
1 1111011 6
2 0011001 3
3 1111111 a
4 0111000 3
5 0101011 4
6 1011010 4
7 1100010 3

12 21 0000111 3
23 32 0010011 3
34 43 1110001 4
45 54 0111000 3 match 4
56 65 1101011 5
67 76 1110010 4
70 07 1100011 4

02 20 0100000 1
13 31 0010100 2
24 42 1100010 3 match 7
35 53 1001001 3
46 64 1010011 4
57 75 0011001 3 match 2
60 06 0010001 2
71 17 1000100 2

14 41 1100101 4

36 63 0100010 2
47 74 0100001 2
50 05 1111010 5
61 16 0110110 4
72 27 1000011 3
